title: cadetia goliathensis
intro: Cadetia goliathensis, also known as the Goliath's cadetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cadetia goliathensis include relief from fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its ability to treat wounds and promote tissue repair. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, which can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
